name: Fresh Raspberry Lattice Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine raspberries, sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture boils and thickens, about 15 minutes.
3. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until the mixture comes to room temperature.
4. Prepare pastry for a two-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Heat oven to 425 degrees.
6. Pour filling into pastry-lined pan; dot with butter.
7. To make lattice top, cut remaining pastry into 1/2-inch-wide strips.
8. Arrange strips in lattice design over the filling.
9. Trim edges and flute.
10. With any remaining pastry, form small, pea-sized balls and place over the crossings in the lattice pattern.
11. Bake at 425 degrees for 35-45 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
13. Garnish with fresh raspberries and/or chocolate leaves for a pretty presentation.
